title: lathyrus aurantius
intro: Lathyrus aurantius, also known as the orange pea or desert pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It is a perennial legume that has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of Lathyrine, a toxin that has been shown to have analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus aurantius include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus aurantius can be made by drying the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
